channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australian Jewish Council criticises Israel's new death penalty laws for Palestinians
item.description: Australia's leading Jewish community body, the Executive Council of Australian Jewry (ECAJ), has criticised Israel's new legislation making the death penalty the default punishment for Palestinians co...

item.title: Pakistan and China Navies Complete Joint Maritime Exercise to Strengthen Security
item.description: The Pakistan Navy and the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) Navy have successfully concluded their seven-day Sea Guardian IV Exercise, running from March 25 to April 1. According to the Inter-Ser...

item.title: Air Tanzania Needs Strategic Fleet Management and Route Planning to Achieve Profitability
item.description: Air Tanzania Company Limited (ATCL) remains under spotlight as the latest Controller and Auditor General (CAG) report shows it as one of the top loss-making government-owned companies. By June 2025, A...

item.title: PNP Reports Over P11B Seized in Illegal Drugs, 16,784 Arrests in First Quarter of 2026
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported significant progress in its anti-drug campaign during the first quarter of 2026. From January 1 to March 30, the PNP conducted a total of 14,550 anti-narc...

item.title: KSE-100 surges as optimism grows over Middle East peace prospects and oil price decline
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) experienced a remarkable surge on Wednesday, with the benchmark KSE-100 index gaining 6,768.25 points, or 4.55 per cent, closing at 155,511.56. This bullish momentum ...

item.title: Kerala High Court Allows Election Petition Against BJP MP Suresh Gopi to Proceed
item.description: The Kerala High Court has allowed a petition challenging the election of Bharatiya Janata Party MP Suresh Gopi from Thrissur during the 2024 Lok Sabha polls. The court, led by Justice Kauser Edappagat...

item.title: Diamond Platnumz plans to launch new Wasafi artistes by July
item.description: Tanzania music big man Diamond Platnumz has announced plans to bring in fresh talent to his Wasafi Classic Baby (WCB) label, aiming to strengthen the country's music industry. According to Diamond on ...

item.title: Africa to have 10 teams at 2026 FIFA World Cup after expansion
item.description: This 2026 FIFA World Cup go mark history as Africa go for show strong representation. Na 10 African teams don secure spots after the tournament expand from 32 to 48 teams. This go make Africa get nine...

item.title: How Kenya’s care economy is changing women’s work, pay and recognition
item.description: Across Kenya, the care economy is slowly gaining ground as one of the most critical sectors shaping the future of work, especially for women. The article highlights how businesses centred on caregivin...

item.title: Thirteen terrorists neutralised in intelligence-based operations across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
item.description: According to the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), Pakistani security forces killed thirteen terrorists in two separate intelligence-based operations (IBOs) conducted in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa on Ma...

item.title: NileAGI and Zanzibar Ministry Join Forces to Advance Local AI Infrastructure
item.description: NileAGI, a Tanzanian company specialising in Artificial Intelligence (AI) research and development, has entered into a collaboration with Zanzibar’s Ministry of ICT and Innovation to strengthen the co...

item.title: Andrea Calleja prepares to compete in Boston Marathon following brain aneurysm recovery
item.description: Andrea Calleja, a dedicated runner, is aiming to participate in the Boston Marathon after a remarkable recovery from a brain aneurysm. This medical condition, which can be life-threatening, forced her...

item.title: Kenyan Government Adopts Artificial Intelligence to Boost National Security
item.description: The Kenyan government has started using artificial intelligence (AI) systems to strengthen efforts in fighting crime and improving public safety. This move comes as part of a broader digital transform...

item.title: AIG urges police to pay fares and maintain good relations with transport workers
item.description: For National Police Day 2026, the Assistant Inspector-General of Police (AIG) for Zone 2, Mr Olohundare Jimoh, waka reach Obalende garage Lagos State, talk to transporters say police must dey pay fare...

item.title: Passover 2026: Dates, traditions, and meaning of the Jewish festival of liberation
item.description: Passover, or Pesach in Hebrew, is one of the most important Jewish holidays, marking the Exodus of the Israelites from slavery in Egypt as described in the Bible. In 2026, Passover begins at sunset on...

item.title: Celebrity Crypto Entrepreneur, Blord, Remanded In Kuje Prison For Impersonation
item.description: Naija dey report say Linus Williams Ifejirika, wey everybody sabi as Blord, one celebrity cryptocurrency entrepreneur, don dey remanded for Kuje Correctional Centre. The matter come after im dey accus...

item.title: Tinambac LGU assures legal action and child welfare in alleged abuse case
item.description: The local government of Tinambac, Camarines Sur, announced that proper legal and administrative procedures are already underway after reports surfaced involving an alleged barangay official and his so...

item.title: Finding Peace at Home: How to Reset During Holy Week Through Sound and Stillness
item.description: The lifestyle article from ABS-CBN, written by Mawi Fojas De Ocampo, promotes a quieter and more reflective way to spend Holy Week at home. It recognizes that many Filipinos use this season as a time ...

item.title: Study shows many tropical insects dey close to their heat limit and fit no survive more warming
item.description: This research wey scientists do for Kenya and Peru don show say many insects wey dey live for tropical regions like Africa dey already reach the highest temperature wey their body fit handle. Insects ...

item.title: Scott Mills addresses historic police investigation following BBC dismissal
item.description: Scott Mills, former BBC Radio 2 presenter, has publicly addressed for the first time the police investigation into allegations of a historic sexual offence. Mills confirmed that in 2016 an allegation ...
